case_title: RENT A CENTER VS RODAS, ROSA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODAS, ROSA $527.19 PRINCIPAL, $103.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $630.69, PLTF IS ENTITLED TO MONEY JUDGMENT ONLY AND MAY NOT RECOVER COMPUTER & COMPUTER DESK IN ADDITION TO MONEY JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
